item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and gave a practical judgment rather than firing a triage/runtime workflow. It did not over-methodize or stop for a hard triage process. Although it did not explicitly name the prior-repair-count gate, it treated the situation as a direct decision question and advised only checking for common cause and making minimal changes if warranted."}
